overview.description: AI-powered product discovery suite for e-commerce (search, recommendations, product listing, analytics)
overview.description_long: Luigi's Box is an intelligent, AI-powered platform built to enhance e-commerce product discovery. It improves the online shopping experience through fast, relevant search results, tailored recommendations, customizable product listings, and an intuitive shopping assistant. Backed by actionable analytics, it helps e-shops boost engagement and drive revenue. Used by 2,000+ e-shops across almost 30 languages, including KiK, Škoda, Nespresso, Under Armour, Notino and Muziker.

history.origin_story: Founded by a team from an academic background studying personalization, profiling, and search. Research began in 2014; officially launched product in 2016 with an analytics tool for e-commerce search.

key_milestones.event: Team begins research on personalization and search
Luigi's Box officially launched with analytics tool for site search
Pandemic spurred team to triple staff; revenue reached 1 million EUR
Doubled revenue third time in a row; 2,000+ e-shops; won E-Commerce Germany Award

financials.revenue_source: Press coverage notes revenue doubled three times in a row as of 2024; reached 1M EUR milestone (year unknown, pre-2024)

awards: G2 Leader in Site Search (multiple years 2022–2025)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Luigi's Box builds AI-powered e-commerce search and discovery, a vertical where foundation models and cloud providers (AWS Personalize, Google Vertex AI Search, Azure) are increasingly competing. Their domain expertise, behavioral data from 2,000+ e-shops, and usage-based model provide some lock-in, but the core NLP/search capabilities are increasingly commoditized.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: E-commerce search and product discovery is a large, established market with proven demand and paying customers across multiple continents. Revenue tripled multiple times in succession, validating strong PMF. Serves businesses of all sizes across 30 languages.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No public funding rounds or VC backing found. Company appears bootstrapped/founder-led, growing on revenue. Revenue doubling multiple times is a positive signal, but lack of external funding and relatively small team (130+) could limit scaling capacity against well-funded competitors.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Strong revenue growth and proven PMF offset the competitive threat from big-tech entrants in AI-powered search. Bootstrapped model is an asset for profitability but a risk for speed-to-scale. Overall a solid vertical SaaS play with medium risk profile.

metadata.notes: HQ is Bratislava, Slovakia; Prague is a secondary office. Company is listed in the Prague/Czech AI catalog due to Czech office presence. Revenue reached 1M EUR milestone; doubled revenue 3 consecutive years through at least 2024. 5-star Glassdoor rating is self-reported on careers page. Founders sourced from /ai-information/ page.
